projects.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>STRUCTURA | Graphite Scaffolding</title>
    <!-- Fonts & Icons -->
    <link href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.0.0/css/all.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <link
        href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;700;900&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@300;500;700&display=swap"
        rel="stylesheet">
    <script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest"></script>

    <style>
        :root {
            --graphite-900: #0c0c0e;
            --graphite-800: #1a1a1e;
            --graphite-700: #2a2a2f;
            --steel-400: #a1a1aa;
            --accent: #ff4d00;
            --white-05: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            --white-10: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            --white-20: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
        }

        /* Reset & Base */
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            cursor: crosshair;
            border-radius: 0 !important;
            user-select: none;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
        }

        body {
            background-color: var(--graphite-900);
            color: #e4e4e7;
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            overflow-x: hidden;
            background-image:
                linear-gradient(to right, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03) 1px, transparent 1px),
                linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03) 1px, transparent 1px);
            background-size: 40px 40px;
        }

        #app {
            position: relative;
            min-height: 100vh;
        }

        .mono {
            font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
        }

        /* Grain Overlay */
        .grain {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 999;
            opacity: 0.04;
        }

        /* Scaffolding Frames */
        .frame-lines {
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 50;

            .line-v {
                position: absolute;
                top: 0;
                bottom: 0;
                width: 1px;
                background: var(--white-05);

                &.left {
                    left: 48px;
                }

                &.right {
                    right: 48px;
                }
            }

            .line-h {
                position: absolute;
                left: 0;
                right: 0;
                height: 1px;
                background: var(--white-05);

                &.top {
                    top: 48px;
                }

                &.bottom {
                    bottom: 48px;
                }
            }

            .rivet {
                width: 4px;
                height: 4px;
                background: var(--accent);
                position: absolute;

                &.tl {
                    top: 46px;
                    left: 46px;
                }

                &.tr {
                    top: 46px;
                    right: 46px;
                }

                &.bl {
                    bottom: 46px;
                    left: 46px;
                }

                &.br {
                    bottom: 46px;
                    right: 46px;
                }
            }
        }

        /* Components */
        .glass-panel {
            background: rgba(26, 26, 30, 0.7);
            backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
            border: 1px solid var(--white-05);
        }

        .hero-text {
            font-weight: 900;
            letter-spacing: -0.05em;
            line-height: 0.85;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fff 0%, #555 100%);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            transition: transform 0.1s ease-out;
        }

        /* Header */
        header {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 48px;
            z-index: 60;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 0 64px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--white-10);

            .logo-section {
                display: flex;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 16px;

                .sys-ref {
                    font-size: 10px;
                    color: var(--accent);
                    font-weight: bold;
                    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
                }

                .separator {
                    height: 16px;
                    width: 1px;
                    background: var(--white-20);
                }

                .brand {
                    text-transform: uppercase;
                    font-weight: 900;
                    font-size: 14px;
                    letter-spacing: 0.2em;
                }
            }

            nav {
                display: none;
                gap: 40px;

                @media (min-width: 768px) {
                    display: flex;
                }

                a {
                    font-size: 10px;
                    text-transform: uppercase;
                    letter-spacing: 0.3em;
                    color: inherit;
                    text-decoration: none;
                    transition: color 0.3s;

                    &:hover {
                        color: var(--accent);
                    }
                }
            }

            .header-meta {
                display: flex;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 16px;
                font-size: 10px;
                color: #71717a;

                .menu-trigger {
                    width: 24px;
                    height: 24px;
                    display: flex;
                    flex-direction: column;
                    justify-content: center;
                    align-items: flex-end;
                    gap: 6px;
                    background: none;
                    border: none;

                    div {
                        height: 1px;
                        background: white;
                        transition: all 0.3s;

                        &:first-child {
                            width: 100%;
                        }

                        &:last-child {
                            width: 66%;
                        }
                    }

                    &:hover div:first-child {
                        width: 50%;
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        /* Main Sections */
        main {
            padding-top: 48px;
        }

        .hero {
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 0 64px;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;

            @media (min-width: 1024px) {
                padding: 0 128px;
            }

            .bg-number {
                position: absolute;
                top: 50%;
                right: 0;
                transform: translateY(-50%) translateX(25%);
                opacity: 0.1;
                pointer-events: none;
                font-size: 25rem;
                font-weight: 900;
            }

            .content-wrap {
                max-width: 1024px;
                z-index: 10;
            }

            .label {
                display: flex;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 16px;
                margin-bottom: 32px;

                .line {
                    width: 48px;
                    height: 1px;
                    background: var(--accent);
                }

                span {
                    font-size: 12px;
                    color: var(--accent);
                    letter-spacing: 0.2em;
                    text-transform: uppercase;
                }
            }

            h1 {
                font-size: 4.5rem;
                margin-bottom: 48px;

                @media (min-width: 768px) {
                    font-size: 10rem;
                }
            }

            .grid-info {
                display: grid;
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                gap: 64px;

                @media (min-width: 768px) {
                    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
                }

                p {
                    color: #a1a1aa;
                    font-size: 18px;
                    line-height: 1.6;
                    font-weight: 300;
                    margin-bottom: 24px;
                }

                .btn-group {
                    display: flex;
                    gap: 16px;
                }
            }
        }

        /* Buttons */
        .btn-primary {
            position: relative;
            padding: 16px 32px;
            background: white;
            color: black;
            font-weight: bold;
            font-size: 12px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.2em;
            border: none;
            overflow: hidden;

            .btn-fill {
                position: absolute;
                inset: 0;
                background: var(--accent);
                transform: translateY(100%);
                transition: transform 0.3s;
                z-index: 0;
            }

            span {
                position: relative;
                z-index: 1;
            }

            &:hover .btn-fill {
                transform: translateY(0);
            }
        }

        .btn-outline {
            padding: 16px 32px;
            background: transparent;
            color: white;
            border: 1px solid var(--white-20);
            font-weight: bold;
            font-size: 12px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.2em;
            transition: border-color 0.3s;

            &:hover {
                border-color: var(--accent);
            }
        }

        /* Technical Card */
        .tech-card {
            padding: 24px;
            position: relative;

            .corner {
                position: absolute;
                width: 16px;
                height: 16px;

                &.tl {
                    top: -1px;
                    left: -1px;
                    border-top: 1px solid var(--accent);
                    border-left: 1px solid var(--accent);
                }

                &.br {
                    bottom: -1px;
                    right: -1px;
                    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--accent);
                    border-right: 1px solid var(--accent);
                }
            }

            header {
                position: static;
                height: auto;
                background: none;
                border: none;
                padding: 0;
                display: flex;
                justify-content: space-between;
                margin-bottom: 32px;

                span {
                    color: #52525b;
                    font-size: 10px;
                }

                i {
                    color: var(--accent);
                    width: 16px;
                }
            }

            .spec-row {
                display: flex;
                justify-content: space-between;
                font-size: 10px;
                padding-bottom: 8px;
                border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
                margin-bottom: 16px;

                span:first-child {
                    color: #52525b;
                }
            }
        }

        /* Vertical Marquee */
        .v-marquee {
            position: absolute;
            right: 48px;
            top: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            width: 48px;
            border-left: 1px solid var(--white-10);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            overflow: hidden;

            .text {
                transform: rotate(90deg);
                white-space: nowrap;
                font-size: 10px;
                text-transform: uppercase;
                letter-spacing: 1em;
                color: #3f3f46;
            }
        }

        /* Portfolio Grid */
        .portfolio {
            border-top: 1px solid var(--white-10);
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            min-height: 600px;

            @media (min-width: 768px) {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            }

            .project-item {
                border-right: 1px solid var(--white-10);
                position: relative;
                overflow: hidden;
                display: flex;
                flex-direction: column;
                justify-content: flex-end;
                padding: 48px;
                min-height: 400px;

                .bg-img {
                    position: absolute;
                    inset: 0;
                    background-size: cover;
                    background-position: center;
                    filter: grayscale(100%);
                    opacity: 0.3;
                    transition: all 0.7s;
                    z-index: 0;
                }

                &:hover .bg-img {
                    opacity: 0.6;
                    transform: scale(1.1);
                    filter: grayscale(0%);
                }

                .content {
                    position: relative;
                    z-index: 10;

                    .index {
                        color: var(--accent);
                        font-size: 12px;
                        margin-bottom: 8px;
                        display: block;
                    }

                    h3 {
                        font-size: 30px;
                        text-transform: uppercase;
                        letter-spacing: -0.02em;
                        margin-bottom: 16px;
                    }

                    p {
                        font-size: 12px;
                        color: #a1a1aa;
                        opacity: 0;
                        transition: opacity 0.5s;
                        max-width: 300px;
                        margin-bottom: 24px;
                    }

                    .line-draw {
                        width: 0;
                        height: 1px;
                        background: var(--accent);
                        transition: width 0.7s;
                    }
                }

                &:hover p {
                    opacity: 1;
                }

                &:hover .line-draw {
                    width: 100%;
                }

                /* Specific for project 2 */
                &.dark-node {
                    background: #050505;

                    .icon-bg {
                        position: absolute;
                        inset: 0;
                        display: flex;
                        align-items: center;
                        justify-content: center;
                        opacity: 0.05;

                        i {
                            font-size: 16rem;
                        }
                    }

                    .tags {
                        display: flex;
                        gap: 8px;
                        margin-bottom: 24px;

                        span {
                            padding: 4px 8px;
                            border: 1px solid var(--white-20);
                            font-size: 8px;
                        }
                    }

                    .link-btn {
                        display: flex;
                        align-items: center;
                        gap: 16px;
                        font-weight: bold;
                        font-size: 10px;
                        transition: transform 0.3s;
                        background: none;
                        border: none;
                        color: white;

                        &:hover {
                            transform: translateX(8px);
                            color: var(--accent);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        /* Stats */
        .stats {
            border-top: 1px solid var(--white-10);
            padding: 96px 64px;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 32px;

            @media (min-width: 768px) {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
            }

            .stat-box {
                .val {
                    font-size: 2.25rem;
                    font-weight: 900;
                    font-style: italic;
                }

                .label {
                    font-size: 10px;
                    color: #52525b;
                    text-transform: uppercase;
                    letter-spacing: 0.2em;
                    margin-top: 8px;
                }
            }
        }

        /* Footer */
        footer {
            margin-top: 80px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--white-10);
            background: #050505;
            padding: 64px;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;

            .glow {
                position: absolute;
                top: 0;
                right: 0;
                width: 256px;
                height: 256px;
                background: rgba(255, 77, 0, 0.05);
                filter: blur(100px);
                pointer-events: none;
            }

            .footer-main {
                display: flex;
                flex-direction: column;
                justify-content: space-between;
                gap: 48px;
                position: relative;
                z-index: 10;

                @media (min-width: 768px) {
                    flex-direction: row;
                }

                .brand-side {
                    max-width: 320px;

                    .brand-mark {
                        display: flex;
                        align-items: center;
                        gap: 8px;
                        margin-bottom: 24px;

                        .dot {
                            width: 12px;
                            height: 12px;
                            background: var(--accent);
                            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
                        }

                        span {
                            font-weight: bold;
                            text-transform: uppercase;
                            letter-spacing: 0.2em;
                        }
                    }

                    p {
                        font-size: 12px;
                        color: #52525b;
                        line-height: 1.6;
                    }
                }

                .links-grid {
                    display: grid;
                    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
                    gap: 64px;

                    @media (min-width: 768px) {
                        grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
                    }

                    .col {
                        h4 {
                            font-size: 10px;
                            color: #d4d4d8;
                            text-transform: uppercase;
                            margin-bottom: 16px;
                        }

                        ul {
                            list-style: none;
                        }

                        li {
                            margin-bottom: 8px;
                        }

                        a {
                            font-size: 10px;
                            color: #52525b;
                            text-decoration: none;
                            transition: color 0.3s;

                            &:hover {
                                color: var(--accent);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            .footer-bottom {
                margin-top: 80px;
                padding-top: 32px;
                border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
                display: flex;
                flex-direction: column;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 16px;

                @media (min-width: 768px) {
                    flex-direction: row;
                    justify-content: space-between;
                }

                .copy {
                    font-size: 8px;
                    color: #3f3f46;
                    letter-spacing: 0.2em;
                    text-transform: uppercase;
                }

                .status {
                    display: flex;
                    align-items: center;
                    gap: 24px;

                    .line {
                        width: 48px;
                        height: 1px;
                        background: #27272a;
                    }

                    span {
                        font-size: 8px;
                        color: #a1a1aa;
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        @keyframes pulse {

            0%,
            100% {
                opacity: 1;
            }

            50% {
                opacity: 0.5;
            }
        }

        /* Scanline effect */
        .scanner::after {
            content: "";
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, var(--accent), transparent);
            height: 2px;
            opacity: 0.3;
            animation: scanline 4s linear infinite;
        }

        @keyframes scanline {
            0% {
                transform: translateY(-100%);
            }

            100% {
                transform: translateY(1000%);
            }
        }
    </style>

        // Initialize Lucide icons
        lucide.createIcons();

        // Subtle Parallax effect on hero text
        document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
            const x = (e.clientX / window.innerWidth) - 0.5;
            const y = (e.clientY / window.innerHeight) - 0.5;
            
            const heroTexts = document.querySelectorAll('.hero-text');
            heroTexts.forEach(el => {
                const speed = 20;
                const xShift = x * speed;
                const yShift = y * speed;
                el.style.transform = `translate(${xShift}px, ${yShift}px)`;
            });
        });

        // Time update simulation
        function updateTime() {
            const now = new Date();
            const timeStr = now.toISOString().substr(11, 8);
            const timeDisplay = document.querySelector('.header-meta .mono');
            if(timeDisplay) timeDisplay.textContent = `UTC: ${timeStr}`;
        }
        setInterval(updateTime, 1000);
        updateTime();
    </script>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pl">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Secure Access Terminal</title>

    <!-- Szybki start: Czcionka JetBrains Mono i Font Awesome -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.0.0/css/all.min.css" rel="stylesheet">

    <style>
        /* ==================== CSS ==================== */

        /* Absolutny wymóg: brak zaokrągleń zawsze i wszędzie */
        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            border-radius: 0 !important;
        }

        body {
            background-color: #09090b;
            color: #a1a1aa;
            font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            overflow: hidden;
            padding: 1rem;
            margin: 0;
        }

        /* Niestandardowy pasek przewijania */
        ::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 4px;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #09090b;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #27272a;
        }

        /* Natywne zagnieżdżanie CSS na głównym kontenerze */
        #app {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;

            & .terminal-frame {
                position: relative;
                width: 100%;
                max-width: 64rem;
                aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;
                border: 1px solid #27272a;
                background-color: rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.5);
                display: flex;
                flex-direction: column;
                overflow: hidden;
                box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);

                & .grid-overlay {
                    position: absolute;
                    inset: 0;
                    pointer-events: none;

                    & .grid-line-v {
                        position: absolute;
                        top: 0;
                        bottom: 0;
                        width: 1px;
                        background-color: #27272a;

                        &.left {
                            left: 2.5rem;
                        }

                        &.right {
                            right: 2.5rem;
                        }
                    }

                    & .grid-line-h {
                        position: absolute;
                        left: 0;
                        right: 0;
                        height: 1px;
                        background-color: #27272a;

                        &.top {
                            top: 2.5rem;
                        }

                        &.bottom {
                            bottom: 2.5rem;
                        }
                    }
                }

                & header {
                    height: 2.5rem;
                    display: flex;
                    align-items: center;
                    justify-content: space-between;
                    padding: 0 3rem;
                    z-index: 10;
                    border-bottom: 1px solid #27272a;

                    & .protocol-text {
                        font-size: 0.625rem;
                        letter-spacing: 0.1em;
                        color: #71717a;
                        text-transform: uppercase;
                    }

                    & .status-dots {
                        display: flex;
                        gap: 1rem;

                        & .dot {
                            width: 0.5rem;
                            height: 0.5rem;

                            &.active {
                                background-color: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.5);
                                animation: pulse 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite;
                            }

                            &.inactive {
                                background-color: #27272a;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }

                & main {
                    flex: 1;
                    display: flex;
                    flex-direction: column;
                    position: relative;

                    & aside {
                        position: absolute;
                        top: 0;
                        bottom: 0;
                        width: 2.5rem;
                        display: flex;
                        flex-direction: column;
                        align-items: center;
                        justify-content: center;
                        padding: 3rem 0;
                        pointer-events: none;
                        /* Całkowicie wyłącza blokowanie kliknięć przez boczne paski */

                        &.left {
                            left: 0;
                        }

                        &.right {
                            right: 0;
                        }

                        & .bar {
                            width: 4px;
                            height: 75%;
                            background-color: #27272a;
                            position: relative;
                            overflow: hidden;

                            & .bar-inner {
                                position: absolute;
                                width: 100%;
                                background-color: #52525b;

                                &.top {
                                    top: 0;
                                    height: 33%;
                                }

                                &.bottom {
                                    bottom: 0;
                                    height: 50%;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    & .banner {
                        height: 33.333%;
                        border-bottom: 1px solid #27272a;
                        position: relative;
                        background: repeating-linear-gradient(45deg,
                                transparent,
                                transparent 10px,
                                rgba(161, 161, 170, 0.1) 10px,
                                rgba(161, 161, 170, 0.1) 12px);
                        transition: height 0.3s;

                        /* Zmniejszony banner gdy zalogowano */
                        &.minimized {
                            height: 2.5rem;
                        }

                        & .banner-text-wrapper {
                            position: absolute;
                            inset: 0;
                            display: flex;
                            align-items: center;
                            justify-content: center;

                            & .banner-text {
                                background-color: #09090b;
                                padding: 0.25rem 1rem;
                                border: 1px solid #27272a;
                                font-size: 0.75rem;
                                letter-spacing: -0.05em;
                                color: #71717a;
                                transition: color 0.3s;
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    & .interface {
                        flex: 1;
                        display: flex;
                        align-items: center;
                        justify-content: center;
                        padding: 1.5rem;
                        position: relative;
                        overflow: hidden;

                        & .view-layer {
                            position: absolute;
                            inset: 1.5rem;
                            display: flex;
                            align-items: center;
                            justify-content: center;
                            opacity: 0;
                            visibility: hidden;
                            pointer-events: none;
                            /* KLUCZOWE: Ukryta warstwa nie może przyjmować kliknięć */
                            transition: opacity 0.4s ease, visibility 0.4s;
                            z-index: 5;

                            &.active {
                                opacity: 1;
                                visibility: visible;
                                pointer-events: auto;
                                /* Włącza interakcję TYLKO dla aktywnej warstwy */
                                z-index: 10;
                                /* Wymusza bycie na wierzchu */
                            }
                        }

                        /* ====== LOGIN VIEW ====== */
                        & .login-card {
                            width: 100%;
                            max-width: 24rem;
                            display: flex;
                            flex-direction: column;
                            align-items: center;
                            gap: 1.5rem;

                            & .icon-placeholder {
                                width: 8rem;
                                height: 5rem;
                                border: 1px solid #27272a;
                                position: relative;
                                overflow: hidden;
                                background: repeating-linear-gradient(45deg,
                                        transparent,
                                        transparent 10px,
                                        rgba(161, 161, 170, 0.1) 10px,
                                        rgba(161, 161, 170, 0.1) 12px);

                                & .icon-overlay {
                                    position: absolute;
                                    inset: 0;
                                    display: flex;
                                    align-items: center;
                                    justify-content: center;
                                    background-color: rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.4);
                                    transition: background-color 0.3s;

                                    &:hover {
                                        background-color: transparent;
                                    }

                                    & i {
                                        font-size: 2rem;
                                        color: #52525b;
                                        transition: color 0.3s;
                                    }

                                    &.granted i {
                                        color: #10b981;
                                    }
                                }
                            }

                            & .input-group {
                                width: 100%;
                                display: flex;
                                flex-direction: column;
                                gap: 1rem;
                                position: relative;
                                z-index: 20;

                                & input {
                                    width: 100%;
                                    background-color: #18181b;
                                    border: 1px solid #27272a;
                                    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
                                    text-align: center;
                                    letter-spacing: 0.5em;
                                    color: #e4e4e7;
                                    font-family: inherit;
                                    pointer-events: auto;

                                    &::placeholder {
                                        color: #3f3f46;
                                    }

                                    &:focus {
                                        outline: none;
                                        border-color: #52525b;
                                        box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #52525b;
                                    }
                                }

                                & .progress-bar {
                                    height: 1rem;
                                    border: 1px solid #27272a;
                                    position: relative;
                                    background: repeating-linear-gradient(45deg,
                                            transparent,
                                            transparent 10px,
                                            rgba(161, 161, 170, 0.1) 10px,
                                            rgba(161, 161, 170, 0.1) 12px);

                                    & .progress-fill {
                                        position: absolute;
                                        top: 0;
                                        bottom: 0;
                                        left: 0;
                                        background-color: rgba(63, 63, 70, 0.3);
                                        width: 0%;
                                        border-right: 1px solid transparent;
                                        transition: width 1.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background-color 0.3s, border-color 0.3s;

                                        &.started {
                                            border-right-color: #52525b;
                                        }
                                    }
                                }

                                & button {
                                    width: 100%;
                                    background-color: #27272a;
                                    color: #e4e4e7;
                                    font-weight: 700;
                                    padding: 1rem;
                                    letter-spacing: 0.2em;
                                    transition: all 0.3s;
                                    border: 1px solid #3f3f46;
                                    text-transform: uppercase;
                                    font-size: 0.875rem;
                                    cursor: pointer;
                                    font-family: inherit;

                                    &:hover {
                                        background-color: #3f3f46;
                                    }

                                    &:active {
                                        background-color: #52525b;
                                    }

                                    &.processing {
                                        animation: pulse 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite;
                                    }

                                    &.denied {
                                        border-color: #7f1d1d;
                                        color: #ef4444;
                                        background-color: rgba(127, 29, 29, 0.1);
                                    }

                                    &.granted {
                                        border-color: #047857;
                                        color: #10b981;
                                        background-color: rgba(4, 120, 87, 0.1);
                                    }
                                }
                            }

                            & .info-text {
                                font-size: 0.625rem;
                                color: #52525b;
                                display: flex;
                                align-items: center;
                                gap: 0.5rem;

                                & i {
                                    font-size: 0.75rem;
                                }
                            }
                        }

                        /* ====== DASHBOARD VIEW ====== */
                        & .dashboard-layout {
                            width: 100%;
                            height: 100%;
                            display: flex;
                            gap: 1.5rem;

                            & .sidebar {
                                width: 14rem;
                                border-right: 1px solid #27272a;
                                padding-right: 1.5rem;
                                display: flex;
                                flex-direction: column;
                                gap: 0.5rem;

                                & .nav-btn {
                                    background: transparent;
                                    border: 1px solid transparent;
                                    color: #a1a1aa;
                                    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
                                    text-align: left;
                                    font-family: inherit;
                                    cursor: pointer;
                                    transition: all 0.2s;
                                    text-transform: uppercase;
                                    font-size: 0.75rem;
                                    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
                                    display: flex;
                                    align-items: center;
                                    gap: 0.75rem;

                                    & i {
                                        font-size: 1rem;
                                        width: 1.25rem;
                                        text-align: center;
                                    }

                                    &:hover,
                                    &.active {
                                        background-color: rgba(39, 39, 42, 0.5);
                                        border-color: #3f3f46;
                                        color: #e4e4e7;
                                    }

                                    &.logout-btn {
                                        margin-top: auto;
                                        color: #ef4444;

                                        &:hover {
                                            background-color: rgba(127, 29, 29, 0.2);
                                            border-color: #7f1d1d;
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }

                            & .content-area {
                                flex: 1;
                                position: relative;

                                & .subpage {
                                    position: absolute;
                                    inset: 0;
                                    display: flex;
                                    flex-direction: column;
                                    opacity: 0;
                                    visibility: hidden;
                                    transition: opacity 0.3s;

                                    &.active {
                                        opacity: 1;
                                        visibility: visible;
                                    }

                                    & .page-header {
                                        border-bottom: 1px solid #27272a;
                                        padding-bottom: 0.75rem;
                                        margin-bottom: 1rem;

                                        & h2 {
                                            margin: 0;
                                            font-size: 1.25rem;
                                            color: #e4e4e7;
                                            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
                                            text-transform: uppercase;
                                        }
                                    }

                                    & .page-content {
                                        flex: 1;
                                        overflow-y: auto;
                                        font-size: 0.875rem;
                                        line-height: 1.6;
                                        color: #a1a1aa;

                                        /* Przykładowe elementy wewnątrz podstron */
                                        & .data-row {
                                            display: flex;
                                            justify-content: space-between;
                                            padding: 0.5rem 0;
                                            border-bottom: 1px dashed #27272a;

                                            & .val.good {
                                                color: #10b981;
                                            }

                                            & .val.warn {
                                                color: #f59e0b;
                                            }
                                        }

                                        & .terminal-log {
                                            background-color: #09090b;
                                            border: 1px solid #27272a;
                                            padding: 1rem;
                                            font-size: 0.75rem;
                                            height: 100%;
                                            overflow-y: auto;

                                            & p {
                                                margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0;
                                            }

                                            & .timestamp {
                                                color: #52525b;
                                                margin-right: 0.5rem;
                                            }

                                            & .sys {
                                                color: #3b82f6;
                                            }

                                            & .err {
                                                color: #ef4444;
                                            }
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }

                        & .vertical-accent {
                            position: absolute;
                            top: 3rem;
                            bottom: 3rem;
                            width: 1px;
                            background-color: rgba(39, 39, 42, 0.5);
                            z-index: 1;
                            pointer-events: none;

                            &.left {
                                left: 1.5rem;
                            }

                            &.right {
                                right: 1.5rem;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }

                & footer {
                    height: 2.5rem;
                    border-top: 1px solid #27272a;
                    padding: 0 3rem;
                    display: flex;
                    align-items: center;
                    justify-content: space-between;
                    font-size: 0.625rem;
                    z-index: 10;

                    & .footer-left {
                        display: flex;
                        gap: 1rem;

                        & .separator {
                            color: #3f3f46;
                        }
                    }

                    & .footer-right {
                        display: flex;
                        align-items: center;
                        gap: 0.5rem;

                        & .status-dot {
                            width: 0.375rem;
                            height: 0.375rem;
                            background-color: #10b981;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        .bg-decoration {
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            z-index: -10;
            opacity: 0.2;
            pointer-events: none;
            background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, #18181b 0%, transparent 100%);
        }

        @keyframes pulse {

            0%,
            100% {
                opacity: 1;
            }

            50% {
                opacity: .5;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            #app .terminal-frame {
                aspect-ratio: auto;
                height: 100vh;
                max-height: 100%;
                border: none;
            }

            #app .terminal-frame main aside {
                display: none;
            }

            #app .terminal-frame main .interface .vertical-accent {
                display: none;
            }

            #app .terminal-frame .grid-overlay .grid-line-v {
                display: none;
            }

            #app .terminal-frame main .interface .dashboard-layout {
                flex-direction: column;
            }

            #app .terminal-frame main .interface .dashboard-layout .sidebar {
                width: 100%;
                flex-direction: row;
                border-right: none;
                border-bottom: 1px solid #27272a;
                padding-right: 0;
                padding-bottom: 1rem;
                flex-wrap: wrap;
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>

<body>

    <div class="bg-decoration"></div>

    <div id="app">
        <div class="terminal-frame">

            <div class="grid-overlay">
                <div class="grid-line-v left"></div>
                <div class="grid-line-v right"></div>
                <div class="grid-line-h top"></div>
                <div class="grid-line-h bottom"></div>
            </div>

            <header>
                <div class="protocol-text">System.Protocol_v2.0</div>
                <div class="status-dots">
                    <div class="dot active"></div>
                    <div class="dot inactive"></div>
                </div>
            </header>

            <main>
                <aside class="left">
                    <div class="bar">
                        <div class="bar-inner top"></div>
                    </div>
                </aside>
                <aside class="right">
                    <div class="bar">
                        <div class="bar-inner bottom"></div>
                    </div>
                </aside>

                <section class="banner" id="top-banner">
                    <div class="banner-text-wrapper">
                        <div class="banner-text" id="banner-text">ENCRYPTED_DATA_STREAM</div>
                    </div>
                </section>

                <section class="interface">

                    <!-- LAYER 1: LOGIN -->
                    <div class="view-layer active" id="view-login">
                        <div class="login-card">
                            <div class="icon-placeholder">
                                <div class="icon-overlay" id="login-icon">
                                    <i class="fa-solid fa-user-shield"></i>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="input-group">
                                <!-- Etykieta ukryta techniką screen-reader-only by nie psuła focusa -->
                                <label for="password" style="position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0,0,0,0);">Password</label>
                                <input type="password" id="password" placeholder="*******" autocomplete="off" autofocus>

                                <div class="progress-bar">
                                    <div class="progress-fill" id="progress-fill"></div>
                                </div>

                                <button id="unlock-btn">Unlock</button>
                            </div>

                            <div class="info-text">
                                <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-info"></i>
                                AUTHORIZED PERSONNEL ONLY
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- LAYER 2: DASHBOARD / PODSTRONY -->
                    <div class="view-layer" id="view-dashboard">
                        <div class="dashboard-layout">

                            <!-- Boczna nawigacja -->
                            <div class="sidebar">
                                <button class="nav-btn active" data-target="page-status">
                                    <i class="fa-solid fa-server"></i> System Status
                                </button>
                                <button class="nav-btn" data-target="page-database">
                                    <i class="fa-solid fa-database"></i> Database
                                </button>
                                <button class="nav-btn" data-target="page-settings">
                                    <i class="fa-solid fa-gear"></i> Settings
                                </button>

                                <button class="nav-btn logout-btn" id="logout-btn">
                                    <i class="fa-solid fa-power-off"></i> Terminate
                                </button>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Treść podstron -->
                            <div class="content-area">

                                <!-- Podstrona: Status -->
                                <div class="subpage active" id="page-status">
                                    <div class="page-header">
                                        <h2>System Overview</h2>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="page-content">
                                        <div class="data-row">
                                            <span>Mainframe CPU Load</span>
                                            <span class="val good">12.4%</span>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="data-row">
                                            <span>Memory Allocation</span>
                                            <span class="val good">45.1%</span>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="data-row">
                                            <span>Network Latency</span>
                                            <span class="val warn">142ms</span>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="data-row">
                                            <span>Active Nodes</span>
                                            <span class="val">8 / 12</span>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="data-row">
                                            <span>Firewall Integrity</span>
                                            <span class="val good">Optimal</span>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                                <!-- Podstrona: Baza danych -->
                                <div class="subpage" id="page-database">
                                    <div class="page-header">
                                        <h2>Encrypted Logs</h2>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="page-content" style="height: calc(100% - 3rem);">
                                        <div class="terminal-log">
                                            <p><span class="timestamp">[07:12:01]</span> <span class="sys">SYS:</span>
                                                Incoming connection from unknown proxy...</p>
                                            <p><span class="timestamp">[07:12:05]</span> <span class="sys">SYS:</span>
                                                Handshake established. Verifying keys.</p>
                                            <p><span class="timestamp">[07:12:14]</span> <span class="err">ERR:</span>
                                                Key exchange failed. Dropping packet.</p>
                                            <p><span class="timestamp">[07:15:22]</span> <span class="sys">SYS:</span>
                                                Routine memory defragmentation started.</p>
                                            <p><span class="timestamp">[07:18:00]</span> <span class="sys">SYS:</span>
                                                User 'ADMIN' accessed sector 7G.</p>
                                            <p><span class="timestamp">[07:22:41]</span> <span class="sys">SYS:</span>
                                                Backup completed successfully.</p>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                                <!-- Podstrona: Ustawienia -->
                                <div class="subpage" id="page-settings">
                                    <div class="page-header">
                                        <h2>Terminal Configuration</h2>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="page-content">
                                        <div class="data-row">
                                            <span>Auto-lock Timer</span>
                                            <span class="val">15 Minutes</span>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="data-row">
                                            <span>Encryption Protocol</span>
                                            <span class="val">AES-256 GCM</span>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="data-row">
                                            <span>Telemetry Upload</span>
                                            <span class="val warn">Disabled</span>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Dekoracyjne akcenty boczne -->
                    <div class="vertical-accent left"></div>
                    <div class="vertical-accent right"></div>
                </section>
            </main>

            <footer>
                <div class="footer-left">
                    <span>LATENCY: 14ms</span>
                    <span class="separator">|</span>
                    <span id="footer-node">NODE: DX-09</span>
                </div>
                <div class="footer-right">
                    <span class="status-dot"></span>
                    <span id="footer-status">AWAITING_AUTH</span>
                </div>
            </footer>

        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        // ==================== JS ====================
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            // Elementy Logowania
            const btn = document.getElementById('unlock-btn');
            const progressFill = document.getElementById('progress-fill');
            const passwordInput = document.getElementById('password');
            const loginIcon = document.getElementById('login-icon');
            
            // Widoki (Layers)
            const viewLogin = document.getElementById('view-login');
            const viewDashboard = document.getElementById('view-dashboard');
            
            // Elementy UI
            const topBanner = document.getElementById('top-banner');
            const bannerText = document.getElementById('banner-text');
            const footerStatus = document.getElementById('footer-status');
            const footerNode = document.getElementById('footer-node');

            // --- LOGIKA LOGOWANIA ---
            if(btn && progressFill && passwordInput) {
                
                // Obsługa klawisza Enter w polu hasła
                passwordInput.addEventListener('keypress', (e) => {
                    if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        btn.click();
                    }
                });

                btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    if (passwordInput.value.trim() === '') {
                        btn.innerHTML = 'INPUT REQUIRED';
                        btn.classList.add('denied');
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            btn.innerHTML = 'UNLOCK';
                            btn.classList.remove('denied');
                        }, 1500);
                        return;
                    }

                    btn.innerHTML = 'PROCESSING...';
                    btn.classList.add('processing');
                    
                    // Start animacji paska
                    progressFill.classList.add('started');
                    progressFill.style.width = '100%';
                    
                    // Symulacja sprawdzenia (każde hasło zadziała dla celów demonstracyjnych)
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        btn.innerHTML = 'ACCESS GRANTED';
                        btn.classList.remove('processing');
                        btn.classList.add('granted');
                        
                        progressFill.style.backgroundColor = 'rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.5)';
                        progressFill.style.borderRightColor = '#10b981';
                        loginIcon.classList.add('granted');
                        
                        // Przejście do Dashboardu
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            viewLogin.classList.remove('active');
                            viewDashboard.classList.add('active');
                            
                            // Zmiany w UI po zalogowaniu
                            topBanner.classList.add('minimized');
                            bannerText.textContent = 'SECURE_SESSION_ACTIVE';
                            bannerText.style.color = '#10b981';
                            footerStatus.textContent = 'SECURE_LINK_ESTABLISHED';
                            footerNode.textContent = 'USER: ADMIN';

                            // Reset formularza w tle
                            setTimeout(() => {
                                btn.innerHTML = 'UNLOCK';
                                btn.classList.remove('granted');
                                progressFill.style.width = '0%';
                                progressFill.classList.remove('started');
                                progressFill.style.backgroundColor = 'rgba(63, 63, 70, 0.3)';
                                progressFill.style.borderRightColor = 'transparent';
                                passwordInput.value = '';
                                loginIcon.classList.remove('granted');
                            }, 500);

                        }, 1000);
                    }, 1500);
                });
            }

            // --- LOGIKA PODSTRON (NAWIGACJA) ---
            const navButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.nav-btn:not(.logout-btn)');
            const subpages = document.querySelectorAll('.subpage');

            navButtons.forEach(button => {
                button.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    // Usuń klasę active z innych przycisków
                    navButtons.forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active'));
                    button.classList.add('active');

                    // Ukryj wszystkie podstrony
                    subpages.forEach(page => page.classList.remove('active'));

                    // Pokaż wybraną
                    const targetId = button.getAttribute('data-target');
                    const targetPage = document.getElementById(targetId);
                    if(targetPage) {
                        targetPage.classList.add('active');
                    }
                });
            });

            // --- LOGIKA WYLOGOWANIA ---
            const logoutBtn = document.getElementById('logout-btn');
            if(logoutBtn) {
                logoutBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    // Powrót do ekranu logowania
                    viewDashboard.classList.remove('active');
                    viewLogin.classList.add('active');
                    
                    // Reset UI
                    topBanner.classList.remove('minimized');
                    bannerText.textContent = 'ENCRYPTED_DATA_STREAM';
                    bannerText.style.color = '#71717a';
                    footerStatus.textContent = 'AWAITING_AUTH';
                    footerNode.textContent = 'NODE: DX-09';
                    
                    // Powrót do pierwszej zakładki "Status"
                    navButtons[0].click(); 
                });
            }
        });
    </script>
</body>

</html>
